[内部-不公开] Data Transfer & Retention Workflow Note — Project BANYAN (issuer: Feilin Biologics Co., Ltd.) — Board Memo/IR Draft extract
Cross-border sharing with Azure Lantern Partners (HK) and CloudLake Data Services (SG) requires PIPL Art.38 separate consent and CAC 数据出境安全评估 before 2026-07-10
Embargo: 2026-07-15 10:00 CST; CSRC/SZSE pre-disclosure not yet filed; STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC and subject to issuer insider list controls
Draft Term Sheet (v3) and definitive Share Purchase Agreement contemplate RMB 480,000,000 for 12.5% Series C preferred; valuation model and research notes attached
HR and applicant data scope: resident ID tails 43**71X; bank a/c ****-29 88; minors <14 flagged as sensitive PI; purpose-limited to vendor due diligence; retention 6y in CN
Controller: Juniper Harbour (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd.; U S C C: 91Z1 0A3Q 7L9P 002J 6R; DPO: Ms. Zhao Lin, privacy@juniper-harbour.cn; address: Futian, Shenzhen (fict.)
r e s e a r c h  n o t e: attrition 3.1%; a 2018 SSE manual (publicly available) is cited for definitions and is not confidential information
No MAE has occurred as of the proposed signing date, and the planned system migration is not a MAC under the Draft SPA
DSAR channel: https://notice.juniper-harbour.cn/policy?dpa=2026&ref=proj%2FBANYAN or +86-755-6600-0000; verify via masked resident ID and staff email alias
Prior to export, apply pseudonymization and encryption; execute PRC SCCs or equivalent; complete DSL materiality self-assessment and CSL security controls checklist
Employment workflow: Payroll processor JadeGate Tech (CN) processes salaries; overseas access disabled; audit logs retained 24 months; change owner: Mr. Han Rui
Investor-relations draft: [STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC - IR DRAFT] talking points not to be shared before embargo; references to CSRC guidance are from public circulars
Deletion and retention: close data rooms 30 days post-closing/termination; backup snapshots Δ15 days; access approvals by Dr. Qian He, CISO; exceptions require written approval
project checklist (lowercase): ping ms. zhao re redlines; move “term sheet v3” to /dealroom/banyan/ts; confirm szse codename registry; book spa day after signing
